summary: The 32 wide-suite failures are not plausibly caused by this lane, but C0 itself is not commit-ready. It has two critical data-safety defects, can certify geometrically unusable labels, and cannot feed the prescribed C1 command correctly.

evidence: scripts/racketsport/ingest_cvat_court_images.py:665-680 accepts any nonempty set of existing manifest source IDs; production code never requires IYnbdRs1Jdk.
ManifestImage.split at lines 91-93 otherwise classifies IYnbdRs1Jdk as train.
A fresh probe denying valid train source 3sC53GlvW_s left all three IY rows train-reachable while retaining 69 train rows across 19 source IDs and all eight holdouts, so the numeric gate can pass.
tests/racketsport/test_ingest_cvat_court_images.py:357-365 tests only a nonexistent typo, not a wrong-but-valid denial.
exact_fixes: In production mode require exactly the permanent deny set containing IYnbdRs1Jdk.
Before CVAT parsing, assert that the pinned manifest contains exactly three IYnbdRs1Jdk rows and that all three are excluded.
Reject wrong-valid and extra deny-source configurations; add adversarial tests.

blocking_findings.finding: The required source/channel/venue-family split is not implemented, and the real manifest has a cross-partition family collision.
evidence: spec.md:28-32 and EXACT_PLAN.md:311-320 require grouping by original source/channel/venue family.
Manifest train source 3sC53GlvW_s and frozen holdout 4qSoA-jwpVM both have channel PPA Tour and venue_group inferred:PPA Tour at package_manifest.json:173-210.
Code partitions and counts solely by source_id at ingest_cvat_court_images.py:91-93, 508-545, and 549-555, while falsely emitting source_family_key equal to source_id.
The fixture assigns every source a unique channel and venue at test_ingest_cvat_court_images.py:143-146, then merely asserts the implementation's descriptive partition string.
exact_fixes: Obtain an authoritative ruling for the PPA collision: move or exclude the entire family, or amend the contract with a defensible frozen family definition.
Fail closed on every train/holdout family intersection before label inspection.
Count actual family groups at the gate and add a shared-family adversarial fixture.

blocking_findings.finding: Syntactically present but unusable court geometry passes as a valid row.
evidence: parse_reviewed_keypoints at ingest_cvat_court_images.py:407-438 checks only label presence and image bounds.
A fresh in-memory probe placed all four required corners at the identical coordinate (1,1); the parser accepted the row.
With enough duplicated rows, evaluate_gate can return COURT_DIVERSITY_ROWS_SUFFICIENT even though no court homography can be solved.
exact_fixes: Reject duplicate, collinear, self-intersecting, singular, or materially degenerate four-corner configurations.
Use a finite/invertible homography or equivalent geometric-validity check.
Add coincident, collinear, crossed-order, and near-zero-area failure tests.

blocking_findings.finding: The emitted artifacts cannot reliably feed the exact C1 training command.
evidence: C0 source_split.json emits train_source_ids, while train_court_model_v2.py:719-737 requires --real-split-proposal to contain a nonempty train_datasets list.
write_corpus stores resolved absolute Mac frame paths at ingest_cvat_court_images.py:604-606; after relocation to an H100 those paths disappear, and C0 emits no source.mp4 fallback.
The focused test validates only the low-level loader immediately in place, not the exact C1 load path or relocation.
exact_fixes: Emit a trainer-compatible split proposal containing train_datasets and explicit holdout metadata.
Emit portable repository-relative paths or provide a supported path-rewrite mechanism.
Integration-test load_real_training_rows with the emitted split and load images after relocating the corpus.

blocking_findings.finding: Other production safeguards are caller- or payload-weakenable.
evidence: Manifest SHA enforcement at ingest_cvat_court_images.py:136-140 is conditional on the manifest's mutable artifact_type; changing that field bypasses the required hash check.
--phash-max-distance accepts 0 at lines 762-765, weakening the production threshold of 3; the exact-collision fixture still passes at either threshold.
The SHA test at test_ingest_cvat_court_images.py:219-220 compares the live file to the implementation constant instead of independently pinning the contract literal.
exact_fixes: Bind production mode unconditionally to both the literal contract SHA and artifact type.
Make synthetic-fixture mode explicit and unavailable through the normal production invocation.
Freeze the production pHash threshold or allow only stricter values.

blocking_findings.finding: The focused suite and export handoff are not commit-valid.
evidence: The focused test unconditionally reads cvat_upload/court_diversity_20260712/package_manifest.json, but that entire 163 MB directory is untracked and outside lane ownership; a clean checkout of the owned commit will fail.
OWNER_GUIDE.md:33-36 directs four shard-specific export zips, while spec.md:17-22 and report.next wait for singular annotations.zip.
The implementation supports a directory of zips, but the required operator command and one-time check do not use it.
exact_fixes: Remove the unit suite's dependency on untracked workstation data or make it an explicit operator-only integration test.
Standardize on the four-zip export directory with exact shard reconciliation, or define a deterministic hash-recorded merge step.
Test missing, duplicate, and incomplete shard exports.

supported: The real export and real corpus are correctly reported absent.
The 4064 passed / 32 failed / 25 skipped counts match wide_suite.junit.xml.
unsupported_or_missing: The PASS claim for source/channel/venue grouping is false.
The claimed fail-closed deny-source validation covers only unknown IDs.
Production rows are described as denied even though no real ingest ran.
counts.reviewed is len(seen), meaning present in XML, including blank or uninspected rows; it is not proof of human review.
Mandatory structured artifacts and count_table fields are absent from report.json.

test_quality.focused_result: 7 passed in the focused artifact and all seven passed again in the wide run.
gate_gaming_findings: Holdout IDs are derived from the implementation constant and compared back to that constant.
The pHash fixture uses an exact collision and does not pin the required distance threshold.
The family fixture assigns unique channel/venue values, hiding the real collision.
No blank-row, degenerate-geometry, valid-wrong-deny, altered-hash/type, 14-versus-15-family, relocation, or exact-C1-handoff test exists.

protected_data_audit.license_note: All 28 current package records are R&D-only standard YouTube sources, not the named BY-NC-SA source.
protected_data_audit.remaining_violation: IYnbdRs1Jdk remains structurally reachable under a wrong-but-valid production denial argument.

basis: All seven owned tests passed in the same run; the module is imported only by its owned test and has no relevant import-time mutation.
The eight socket failures have PermissionError/socket-bind traces and no C0 dependency.
The eighteen CAL failures track pre-existing protected-fixture drift.
The scaffold index classifies C0 as dataset with its direct test; the three unknown CLIs are unrelated.
The two storage failures name artifacts introduced by ancestor commit f9dc11dfc.
The BALL, EVENT, and trainer-timeout failures have independent code paths and tracebacks.

rereview_requirements: Correct report.json claims and add the mandatory structured fields.
Run the focused suite from a clean checkout without untracked data dependencies.
Run the exact C1 loader handoff and relocation test.
Rerun the full tests/racketsport suite and preserve exact attribution.
